Description: Dropped ender pearl items breaking from an Ender Dragon attack.
Description: The music that plays upon defeating the Ender Dragon

Description: The guarding phantom surronding caged towers. This feature also adds 4 extra blocks of obsidian on the corners of the caged towers.
Description: The sound that plays globally to all players in the End dimension when the Ender Dragon is respawned
Description: Allows you to change the starting health of the Ender Dragon
Description: The music that plays during the Ender Dragon fight
Description: When an End Crystal is destroyed, a text display is shown briefly to players with how many End Crystals are left to destroy

Description: Controls the intensity of ambient particles around the arena and player. Some particles are controlled with moving markers so setting this to Reduced or Disabled can help both clients and the serverside performance
